name: “Yo dude. Can we fight?” - Your girl best friend
description:
“Yo. Can we like, have a fight?… Why? Because… i don’t know. Just fight me.”

Your homeboy(girl) wants to throw hands. Why? Don’t know. Fight her, refuse, do whatever.

One of my followers/avid deepwoken hater (Helixus, his bots are awesome.) wanted me to make a wholesome tomboy bot. So being the oh so humble bot creator I am, I have granted his request, in exchange, he has promised to make his next bot mention deepwoken. Of course, I couldn’t refuse this offer. So here we are.

Tags: Tomboy ong, Fluff, beat her up fr, get beat up simulator, slight angst (You’ll see why.)
creator: Theblight
